title: Bearbao Toddler Boy Toys for 2 3 4 5 6 Years Old Boys, 65 Inches Race Track for Boys Kids Die-Cast Transport Truck Car Toy, Toddler Car Toys Set for Kids Boy
features: 【Multifunctional Transport Truck Toys】This trucks for 2 3 4 5 6 year old boys makes for great push car play on its own, while also serving as storage space for small vehicles. And the 3-in-1 truck toy for boys also transforms into a 65-inch race track with a dual launcher for competitive racing.

【Suitable For 2 3 4 5 6 Years Old Boys Kids】Truck toys for 2 3 4 5 6 years old comes with 1 truck and 6 mini metal race cars. All of them are designed with popular color and eye-catching appearance that little car lovers will really enjoy it. There are enough parking spaces for small cars, which can exercise the child's storage abilities.

【No Need Batteries】A secure latch in the back opens and pulls out to create a 65-inch racetrack, which is great for 2 players to race. Just press a button and the launcher will automatically push the die-cast cars onto the track. Compete with your partner to see whose car is faster!

【Safe for Kids】Toy cars use environmentally friendly and safe materials for child safety. Non toxic and odorless, with a smooth surface to protect children's hands from harm. Toy cars come with handles, allowing children to easily unfold and fold the tracks, while also lifting the handles to transport light trucks.

【2 3 4 5 6 Years Old Birthday Gift】The car track truck toys is perfect for toddlers boys girls who loves toy trucks and model car. Suitable for 2 3 4 5 6 7 8 year old boy birthday party gift Children's Day Christmas.
